qa_process.notes: Mixed manual and automated testing. Selenium covers basic UI flows. Most gameplay testing is manual. Regression suite runs nightly but coverage is low.

localization.notes: Crowdin handles string management. Professional translators for EFIGS, cheaper vendors for Asian languages. Context screenshots are provided inconsistently. LQA is done in-house.

asset_creation.notes: Established art pipeline but manual handoffs between stages. Some reusable material libraries. Style guide exists but enforcement is inconsistent across teams.

deployment.notes: Jenkins handles builds but deployment to console platforms has manual steps. Separate build configs per platform cause drift. Hotfix process is ad-hoc.

audio.notes: Sound design done in-house. Voice recording outsourced to studios. Post-processing is time-intensive. Placeholder audio stays in builds too long.
